channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The pint-sized Sonos Roam 2 is more over 20 percent this weekend
item.description: Sonos is no stranger to the occasional sale. The iconic audio company routinely runs sales around Black Friday, Amazon Prime Day, and the Super Bowl, though it’s rare to see substantial discounts on its portable speakers outside of tentpole shopping events. Fortunately, if you have no interest in the Sonos Move 2 or forthcoming Sonos […]

item.title: I didn’t think the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N could get much better — until I drove its bigger brother
item.description: Hyundai aces the difficult second album, as its Ioniq 6 N shifts the performance EV game up a gear.

item.title: À peine sorti, l’Oppo Reno 15 Pro s’offre déjà une remise de 100 euros avec des écouteurs gratuits
item.description: Avec son Reno 15 Pro, Oppo propose un smartphone puissant et polyvalent capable notamment de filmer en 4K. Pour le faire découvrir au plus grand nombre, la marque propose une première remise pour le faire tomber à 699 euros au lieu de 799 euros, sans oublier le petit cadeau en prime.

item.title: Best Merino Wool Clothing (2026): Base Layers, Hoodies, Jackets & More
item.description: Merino is one of the best fabrics you can wear. We explain the different blends, what “gsm” means, and how to care for your clothes.

item.title: AI was everywhere at gaming’s big developer conference — except the games
item.description: AI was everywhere at the GDC Festival of Gaming this year. Vendors at the event pitched generative AI tools for things like making AI-driven NPCs and even entire games from a chat box. On the show floor, I spent 10 minutes playing a demo of a pixel-art fantasy world generated by Tencent's AI tools. In […]

item.title: Online age checks came first — a VPN crackdown could be next
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about online age verification and your privacy, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Virtual private networks, or VPNs, weren't always […]

item.title: An exclusive tour of Amazon’s Trainium lab, the chip that’s won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple
item.description: Shortly after Amazon announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited me on a private tour of the chip lab at the heart of the deal.

item.title: How to watch Univision for FREE
item.description: We've uncovered a sneaky way to watch Univision for FREE from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Ikea Varmblixt Smart Lamp Fills a Donut Hole in My Life
item.description: I love this color-changing donut lamp.

item.title: Which Instax Camera Should You Buy? (2026)
item.description: Should you buy an Instax Mini or Mini Evo? Instax Square or Wide? We demystify Fujifilm’s Instax lineup to help you find the perfect instant camera (or printer).

item.title: How to Back Up Your Android Phone (2026)
item.description: Do your future self a favor and back up all your precious photos, messages, and files before disaster strikes.

item.title: Tottenham vs Nottm Forest Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Tottenham vs Nottm Forest live streams online and from anywhere, as two struggling Premier League sides contest a relegation six-pointer.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone has hit its best-ever price at Amazon — save $500 this weekend
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,099 at Amazon. That's the record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim yours this weekend
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Sign up for a T-Mobile plan for 24 months and get the Apple iPhone 17e for free.
